headline: Crocs Drives Growth on Brand Strength, DTC Expansion and Innovation
summary: CROX sharpens brand strategy, expands DTC channels and targets cost savings while revamping HEYDUDE to drive growth and protect margins.

raw.headline: Crocs Drives Growth on Brand Strength, DTC Expansion and Innovation
raw.summary: CROX sharpens brand strategy, expands DTC channels and targets cost savings while revamping HEYDUDE to drive growth and protect margins.

headline: Can Estee Lauder's One ELC Media Shift Under PRGP Lift Margins?
summary: EL taps WPP for One ELC global media, aiming to cut overlap, speed reallocations and lift marketing ROI as PRGP savings build in FY27.

raw.headline: Can Estee Lauder's One ELC Media Shift Under PRGP Lift Margins?
